title: Business Development Executive (Sales)
description: Drive growth by identifying new business opportunities in the logistics and supply chain sector. Build strong client relationships.

title: Senior Sales Manager
description: Lead our regional sales team and develop strategic partnerships with enterprise-level logistics providers and manufacturers.

title: Digital Marketing Specialist
description: Manage our social media presence, SEO campaigns, and performance marketing to increase Logipod's brand visibility globally.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Scale our core logistics intelligence platform using React, Node.js, and advanced data visualization tools.

title: Operations Lead
description: Optimize last-mile delivery workflows and coordinate between tech teams and ground operations for maximum efficiency.

title: UI/UX Designer
description: Create intuitive and premium user interfaces for our complex B2B dashboards and client-facing mobile applications.
